user_query: Some work events got cancelled. On Day 2, change any work related events to Personal Day.

description.from: Formal business meeting at TD Tower with key stakeholders. High-pressure work presentation and strategy discussion. Professional corporate environment.
description.to: Morning set aside for personal time: relax at the hotel, visit a nearby café, take a leisurely walk, or do light sightseeing. No work commitments or meetings scheduled.

update_results.path: Root > Itinerary_Version 12 > Itinerary > Day 2 > Strategy Workshop

description.from: Intensive afternoon workshop session with the team. Long work hours in conference room. Mentally draining but productive.
description.to: Afternoon reserved for personal activities: visit a museum, go shopping, enjoy a spa treatment, or relax at a café. No work sessions or team meetings planned.
